prompt: Create Express.js patient routes with full CRUD: POST /api/patients (register new patient with medical info), GET /api/patients (list with search by name/phone, pagination, filter by doctor), GET /api/patients/:id (with medical history), PUT /api/patients/:id, DELETE /api/patients/:id (soft delete). All routes scoped to req.user.clinic_id. Log all actions to audit_logs table.
